ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "period_ended" TEXT /* Date the period ended */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report */,
  "cash" REAL /* Cash amount for the fiscal year */,
  "short_term_investments" REAL /* Short-term investments amount for the fiscal year */,
  "total_cash_and_investments" REAL /* Total cash and short-term investments amount for the fiscal year */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., income statement, balance sheet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, accountant, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the role (e.g., view_report, edit_report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_categories" (
  "report_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the report category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_category_mapping" (
  "report_category_mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report category mapping */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "report_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_category_mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_category_mapping_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_category_mapping_report_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_category_id") REFERENCES report_categories ("report_category_id")
)
